title: Database Field
text: Database Field A database field is a Modeled Field whose Is External property is True , so it is also known as an external field . It can be used in database I/O. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: fld Main Development Object? No Part of: Entity Contains: Value, Property , Code Container Generalization: Modeled Field Specializations: Derived Component Field Compilation Output: — Related Links Is External Determines whether the Field's data can be externalized outside the component, either by storing it in a database or passing it in an entity or occurrence parameter.
